fields.name: name
fields.label: Section Name
fields.description: The label shown for this section in the Content Tree

fields.label: tab area (%)
fields.name: widthTabArea
fields.description: Width percentage for tab area column. Media area is auto-calculated.

fields.label: text area (%)
fields.name: widthTextArea
fields.description: Width percentage for text area column.

options.name: Variant 1 - Small bar num, text next to bar
Variant 2 - Small bar num, text next to bar, with arrow
Variant 3 - Small bar num, text on top of bar
Variant 4 - Small bar num, text on top of bar, with arrow
Variant 6 - Large bar num, with arrow

fields.label: Bar Color
fields.name: barRowColor
fields.description: Hex without #. For gradient use comma: 00ffee,ff00ee

fields.label: Arrow Color
fields.name: arrowColor
fields.description: Hex without #. For gradient use comma: 00ffee,ff00ee

fields.label: sub item sub title font color
fields.name: subItemSubtitleFontColor

fields.label: CTA Section ID
fields.name: ctaSectionId
fields.description: ID of the section to scroll to

fields.label: ratio
fields.name: ratioD
fields.description: If both height and width are set, the ratio is ignored.

fields.label: ratio value(customized)
fields.name: ratioValueCustomizedD
fields.description: please Use W:H format as 16:9, 4:3 or 1:1 to force the block's aspect. Select 'auto' to keep the image's native dimensions. Use presets when possible.

fields.label: ratio
fields.name: ratioT
fields.description: If both height and width are set, the ratio is ignored.

fields.label: ratio value(customized)
fields.name: ratioValueCustomizedT
fields.description: please Use W:H format as 16:9, 4:3 or 1:1 to force the block's aspect. Select 'auto' to keep the image's native dimensions. Use presets when possible.

fields.label: ratio
fields.name: ratioM
fields.description: If both height and width are set, the ratio is ignored.

fields.name: ratioValueCustomizedM
fields.description: please Use W:H format as 16:9, 4:3 or 1:1 to force the block's aspect. Select 'auto' to keep the image's native dimensions. Use presets when possible.
